name: Famous Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the vegetable shortening, brown sugar, granulated sugar, egg, water, and vanilla until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the oats, flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until well combined.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack until completely cooled.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
MY OWN SPECIAL COOKIES: Add 1 cup of any or a combination of the following ingredients to the basic cookie dough: raisins, chopped nuts, chocolate chips, or coconut. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
